dashboard.alt: Dreamspell dashboard showing today's kin, the Gregorian date, and the monthly calendar in dark mode.

calendar.alt: Dreamspell calendar view in dark mode showing the 13 Moon month grid and kin dates.

explorer_selector.alt: Dreamspell Kin Explorer in dark mode with the circular kin selector and dark picker controls.

course.alt: Dreamspell course screen in dark mode with guided lessons for learning the system.

context_course.alt: Dreamspell context course in dark mode explaining what Dreamspell means and how to approach it respectfully.

tones_reference.alt: Dreamspell 13 Galactic Tones reference screen in dark mode.

seals_reference.alt: Dreamspell 20 Solar Seals reference screen in dark mode.

journal.alt: Dreamspell Journal screen in dark mode with local reflection entries.

resources.alt: Dreamspell Resources screen in dark mode with privacy, context, and study cards.

annual_transition.alt: Dreamspell annual transition diagram showing 13 Moons, the Day Out of Time, and the Dreamspell new year on July 26.

ipad_explorer.alt: Dreamspell Kin Explorer on iPad in dark mode with the larger wheel layout.

groups.title: Start with the kin of the day
groups.description: The fastest way into Dreamspell is to see today’s signature, the current Gregorian date, and the reflection context tied to the day.

cards.title: Today’s kin at a glance
cards.description: Open the app to see the current kin, Gregorian date, lunar phase, and daily reflection context in one place.

groups.title: Move through the 13 Moon year
groups.description: The calendar view helps people move from dates into rhythm, so the 13-Moon year and the Tzolkin stop feeling abstract.

cards.title: 13 Moon calendar study
cards.description: Browse the 13-Moon year, inspect kin by date, and move between calendar timing and the deeper Tzolkin study rhythm.

groups.title: Inspect how a kin comes together
groups.description: Kin Explorer is where tones, seals, and combinations become interactive instead of theoretical.

cards.title: Kin Explorer with the current dark controls
cards.description: The selector capture shows the current dark picker styling and the kin wheel layout people use to study tones, seals, and relationships inside the app.

groups.title: Study the system with guided lessons and references
groups.description: The app teaches through both guided Dreamspell lessons and dedicated reference screens for tones and seals.

cards.title: Dreamspell Course as guided study
cards.description: The in-app course walks lesson by lesson through Dreamspell basics and clearly frames the app as Dreamspell study.

cards.title: 13 Galactic Tones as a study screen
cards.description: Each tone gets its own explanation, keywords, and summary so the rhythm of the 13-tone sequence is easy to study inside the app.

cards.title: 20 Solar Seals as the matching reference path
cards.description: The seal guide complements the tones screen so people can learn both halves of a kin signature before moving deeper into the glossary.

groups.title: Keep notes tied to your practice
groups.description: Reflection stays local to the device in the current release, making journaling part of the study flow instead of a separate tool.

cards.title: Private journal reflections
cards.description: Capture dated notes tied to your Dreamspell practice while keeping journal entries local to the device in the current release.

groups.title: Open the same ideas on a wider canvas
groups.description: The iPad layout gives the Explorer more room and makes ongoing study feel more spacious on larger screens.

cards.title: Wider-screen kin exploration
cards.description: The iPad layout carries the same modern dark presentation into a roomier Kin Explorer screen, giving the wheel and controls more space to breathe.
